issues.description: Condition requires HasRestingDon count of 1, but card text says 'up to 2 rested DON!!' — condition should check for at least 1 resting DON, or be removed to allow flexibility
Action specifies count: 2 (fixed), but card text says 'up to 2' — should be variable/optional, not guaranteed 2
Target scope is 'ChooseOwnCharacter' only, but card text permits 'your Leader or 1 of your Characters' — target should allow Leader as an option

suggestedDsl.effectText: [DON!! x1] [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] Give up to 2 rested DON!! cards to your Leader or 1 of your Characters.
